---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement to the project
title: "[Feature] Clear, descriptive title"
labels: [enhancement]
assignees: ''

---

## 📌 Is your feature request related to a problem?

Describe the problem or use case your feature would address. Be specific.

> Example: "I'm always frustrated when I need to manually X, and there's no way to Y..."

---

## ✅ Describe the solution you'd like

Describe the desired behavior or change in functionality.

> What should happen? If it's UI-related, describe the interaction. If it's backend/API, describe expected inputs/outputs.

---

## 🔁 Describe alternatives you’ve considered

Have you thought about other ways to solve the problem?  
Why were they not suitable?

---

## 📋 Acceptance Criteria (Optional)

> What needs to be true for this feature to be considered "done"?

- [ ] Clearly solves the described problem
- [ ] Integrates with XYZ component
- [ ] Passes all automated tests
- [ ] ...

---

## 🖼️ Additional context (Optional)

Add any other context, design ideas, diagrams, mockups, or screenshots that might help explain your idea.

---

<details>
<summary>📚 Relevant references (Optional)</summary>

- Link to related issues or PRs
- Similar features in other tools or frameworks
- Technical documentation / API references

</details>
